case_title: BRANCH JAMES A VS STUDIO INSTRUMENT RENTAL

docket_entries.description: CERT. RECEIPT TO DAN REMPP (STUDIO INST. RENTAL) RETURNED SIGNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $650.00 FILED BY BRANCH JAMES A AS TO DEFENDANT STUDIO INSTRUMENT RENTAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRANCH JAMES A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STUDIO INSTRUMENT RENTAL $544.10 PRINCIPAL, $9.00 INTEREST, $19.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $572.89 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
